product.default_description: Fresh and crispy, straight from the kitchen to your hands.
product.error_favorite: An error occurred while modifying favorites!

cart.orderSuccess: Order placed! The bartender is already preparing it.
cart.notEnoughStock: There is not enough stock of one of the products!
cart.loginRequired: Please log in to proceed with your order.
cart.emptyCartSub: It's time to choose something delicious!

home.heroBadge: Fresh and hot food every day
home.heroDesc: Order your favorite meals online and pick them up at the snack bar without waiting in line! Fresh ingredients, fast service.
home.feature1Desc: Forget the long lines! Pre-order and just pick up your food.
home.feature2Desc: Freshly made sandwiches and meals await you every day.
home.feature3Desc: A few clicks on your phone and your snack is being prepared.
home.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of satisfied students who already order their daily meal from us!

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1P1: Welcome to BuffetApp. By using the website, you accept these terms of use.
terms.section1P2: Our service aims to minimize queueing at the snack bar with online pre-ordering.
terms.section2Item1: Orders are recorded by the system; we take no responsibility for errors arising from stock shortages.
terms.section2Item2: Payment takes place at the snack bar upon pickup (cash or card).
terms.section2Item3: Ordered products must be picked up within 15 minutes.
terms.section3P1: BuffetApp takes no responsibility for technical issues or allergic reactions related to product ingredients (please inquire about allergens at the snack bar).

contact.successToast: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you shortly.
contact.title: Get in touch with us!
contact.subtitle: Do you have a question about your order, or just want to send some feedback? Write to us, and our colleagues will answer soon!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: BuffetApp is committed to protecting users' personal data. The purpose of this notice is to show how we handle your data.
privacy.sec1Item1: Registration data (Name, Email address, Password - encrypted)
privacy.sec1Item2: Order history (What, when, and for how much you ordered)
privacy.sec1Item3: Technical data (IP address, browser type in the form of cookies for operation)
privacy.sec2Title: How do we use the data?
privacy.sec2Desc: We use the data exclusively for providing the service, fulfilling orders, billing, and maintaining the security of your user account. We do not release data to third parties, except in the case of legal obligations.
